title: Enterprise pricing - Adya AI
source_name: follow-builders cloud fallback / keyword search / Anysearch
full_text:
// Recommended for enterprise
Three deployment shapes. Pick by your constraint.
Cloud is fastest, on-prem fits regulated and sovereign workloads, sovereign-tier SLA layers on top of any deployment. Most enterprise customers run a mix: cloud for non-regulated workloads, on-prem for the rest, all governed by AGP.
100-seat Cloud
Enterprise Cloud
~$300K / year (100 seats)
Volume band kicks in heavy: 40% off at 100-249 seats, 50% off at 250+. Multi-region active-active.
100 seats x ~$3,000 effective (40% off list)
Unlimited apps, workflows, fine-tunes
175,000 coins/user/year
SSO/SAML/SCIM, audit logs, BYOC supported
99.5% SLA (Standard) included
Talk to sales
100-user On-prem
On-prem licence
$240K / year fixed
Air-gap-ready, sovereign-region, regulated industries. All three IP pillars (AGP, MAN+ESM, AI-ELT) included.
Fixed-term licence - not per-user metered
100 users covered
AGP + MAN+ESM + AI-ELT bundled
Air-gap deployment supported
Annual licence renewal
Talk to sales
Sovereign + Premium SLA
Top-tier reliability
+60% uplift
99.99% uptime, sovereign region pinning, dedicated technical SE. Layers on top of any deployment.
Sovereign tier: +60% on platform fees
99.99% uptime SLA - 5-min response
Dedicated technical SE + named CSM
Multi-region active-active mandatory
Compliance: SOC2 + ISO 27001 + HIPAA
Talk to sales
// Worked example
100-seat regulated workload, 3-year commitment.
A typical enterprise scenario: BFSI or healthcare, 100 builders + analysts, AGP Business required, AI-ELT at 30M MAR for the data layer, ESA for analyst-tier research, Premium SLA. 3-year contract, BYO LLM, BYO cloud.
Platform Enterprise Cloud (100 seats) 40% volume discount at 100-249 seat band -> ~$3,000/user/year
$300,000
AGP Business (100K policy calls/month) $15,500/month x 12 - includes custom policy DSL
$186,000
AI-ELT 30M MAR $20,000/month x 12 - vector + ELT + agent memory
$240,000
ESA Enterprise (10 seats for analyst desk) $1,299/month x 12
$15,588
Premium SLA uplift (25%) 99.9% uptime - applies to platform-fee subtotal
+$185,397
Sub-total before multi-year
$926,985
3-year multi-year discount (15%) Locked rate over 3 years
-$139,048
Year-1 cost (after term discount)
~$788K
Indicative for a fully-loaded enterprise stack. Most enterprise deals close in the $280-520K range depending on capability mix - buyers typically negotiate 5-10% off list, and capability mix often drops AI-ELT or ESA out of year-1 if not yet ready.
// Build your stack
What enterprise teams typically buy.
Platform Enterprise + AGP Business is the floor. AI-ELT joins when the data layer becomes a bottleneck. ESA covers the analyst desk. Most enterprise deals span 2-3 years with locked-rate pricing.
Platform Enterprise
From $4,999/user/yr
Volume bands at 10/25/50/100/250. On-prem from $40K. Sovereign region pinning available.
AGP Business
$15,500/mo
100K policy calls/month. Custom policy DSL. SOC2-ready. Often bundled into platform deal.
AI-ELT 30M MAR
$20,000/mo
Vector store + embedding pipelines + agent memory at 30M monthly active records.
ESA Enterprise
$1,299-$17,500/mo
Multi-step research and strategy synthesis for analyst desks. 10-250 seats.
Enterprise scoping in one call.
Most enterprise scoping calls take 60-90 minutes. Bring your seat counts, deployment constraints, compliance requirements, and term preference - we'll ship a formal quote within a week.
Talk to sales
Run the calculator
